TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SRC_EFF_FROM_DT = INP_SRC_EFF_FROM_DT AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = INP_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND INTEGRATION_ID = INP_INTEGRATION_ID

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: Source Adapter that loads source specific logic for Employee related information.
MAPPLET.NAME: mplt_SA_ORA_EmployeeDimension

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE AS PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER AS PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID AS PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AS DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM AS DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='W1'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.STREET_ADDRESS as STREET_ADDRESS, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.TOWN_OR_CITY as TOWN_OR_CITY, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.STATE as STATE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.REGION as REGION, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.COUNTRY as COUNTRY, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.POSTAL_CODE as POSTAL_CODE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_TO as DATE_TO, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_ID as ADDRESS_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_FROM as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP WHERE PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' AND ADDRESS_TYPE =''

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = PERSON_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN AND DATE_TO >= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_ID as ADDRESS_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.STREET_ADDRESS as STREET_ADDRESS, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.TOWN_OR_CITY as TOWN_OR_CITY, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.STATE as STATE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.REGION as REGION, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.COUNTRY as COUNTRY, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.POSTAL_CODE as POSTAL_CODE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_FROM as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_STYLE as ADDRESS_STYLE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_LINE1 as ADDRESS_LINE1, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_LINE2 as ADDRESS_LINE2, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_LINE3 as ADDRESS_LINE3, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_TYPE as ADDRESS_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.PRIMARY_FLAG as PRIMARY_FLAG, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_TO as DATE_TO ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION13 as X_ADD_INFORMATION13 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION14 as X_ADD_INFORMATION14 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION15 as X_ADD_INFORMATION15 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION16 as X_ADD_INFORMATION16 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION17 as X_ADD_INFORMATION17 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION18 as X_ADD_INFORMATION18 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION19 as X_ADD_INFORMATION19 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION20 as X_ADD_INFORMATION20 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_REGION_1 as X_REGION_1 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_REGION_1 as X_REGION_2 ,W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_REGION_1 as X_REGION_3 FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP WHERE PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' AND ADDRESS_TYPE in ('IN_P','HK_R','PHCA', 'IN_C','Default','PRA','INT')

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = PERSON_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN AND DATE_TO >= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='P'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='M'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='PM'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='W2'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='HF'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='O'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='H1'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='H2'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION1 = 'Y' THEN '3' WHEN PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION7 = 'Y' THEN '13' WHEN REGEXP_COUNT(PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION2 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION3 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION4 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION5 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION6, 'Y') > 1 THEN '13' WHEN PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION2 = 'Y' THEN '6' WHEN PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION3 = 'Y' THEN '4' WHEN PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION4 ='Y' THEN '2' WHEN PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION5 = 'Y' THEN '5' WHEN PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION6 ='Y' THEN '1' WHEN REGEXP_COUNT(PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION1 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION2 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION3 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION4 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION5 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION6 || PPEI.PEI_INFORMATION7, 'N') = 7 THEN '-99' ELSE NULL END as ETHINIC_GROUP_CODE, PAPF.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID FROM PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO PPEI ,PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F PAPF where PAPF.PERSON_ID=PPEI.PERSON_ID AND PPEI.INFORMATION_TYPE = 'US_ETHNIC_ORIGIN'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.ADDRESS_ID as ADDRESS_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.STREET_ADDRESS as STREET_ADDRESS, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.TOWN_OR_CITY as TOWN_OR_CITY, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.STATE as STATE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.REGION as REGION, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.COUNTRY as COUNTRY, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.POSTAL_CODE as POSTAL_CODE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_FROM as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION13 as X_ADD_INFORMATION13, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION14 as X_ADD_INFORMATION14, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION15 as X_ADD_INFORMATION15, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION16 as X_ADD_INFORMATION16, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION17 as X_ADD_INFORMATION17, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION18 as X_ADD_INFORMATION18, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION19 as X_ADD_INFORMATION19, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_ADD_INFORMATION20 as X_ADD_INFORMATION20, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_REGION_1 as X_REGION_1, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_REGION_2 as X_REGION_2, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.X_REGION_3 as X_REGION_3, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM , W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP.DATE_TO as DATE_TO FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_ADDRESSES_TMP WHERE PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' AND ADDRESS_TYPE in ('MAIL','TMPMAIL','PL_TX', 'REC')

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = PERSON_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN AND DATE_TO >= DATE_FROM_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_NUMBER as PHONE_NUMBER, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PARENT_ID as PARENT_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.PHONE_TYPE as PHONE_TYPE, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP.DATE_FROM as DATE_FROM FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D_PHONES_TMP WHERE PHONE_TYPE='WF'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PARENT_ID = PARENT_ID_IN AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DATASOURCE_NUM_ID_IN AND DATE_FROM <= DATE_FROM_IN

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: EXT_W_ETHNIC_GRP_CODE||'~' || EXT_W_SEX_MF_CODE||'~'|| INP_MARITAL_STATUS||'~'|| EXT_W_VETERAN_STATUS_CODE||'~'|| INP_PER_INFORMATION4||'~'|| INP_REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG||'~'|| INP_HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE||'~'|| INP_RELIGION_CODE
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: EXT_PAR_DEMOG_INTEGRATION_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CASE WHEN PEI_INFORMATION1 = 'YES' THEN 'Y' ELSE PEI_INFORMATION1 END AS ECR_FLAG , PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID FROM PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO WHERE INFORMATION_TYPE = 'JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW'--

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Source Adapter that loads source specific logic for Employee related information.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: mplt_SA_ORA_EmployeeDimension

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: Business component for Employee Dimension extracts information with respect to employee such as the employee name,address ,sex and so on from from Oracle Apps tables PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F, PER_PERIODS_OF_ SERVICE, RA_SALESREPS_ALL and PO_AGENTS_V .
MAPPLET.NAME: mplt_BC_ORA_EmployeeDimension

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT T.QUALIFICATION_TYPE_ID AS GRADE, Q.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, Q.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AS BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, Q.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM PER_QUALIFICATIONS Q, PER_QUALIFICATION_TYPES T WHERE Q.STATUS = 'COMPL' AND Q.QUALIFICATION_TYPE_ID = T.QUALIFICATION_TYPE_ID AND T.CATEGORY IN ($$QUALIFICATION_CATEGORY_LIST) ORDER BY Q.PERSON_ID,Q.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID,Q.END_DATE,T.RANK DESC --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = PERSON_ID_IN AND BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = BUSINESS_GROUP_ID_IN AND END_DATE <= DATE_TO_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: POSITION_ID = POSITION_ID_IN AND BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = BUSINESS_GROUP_ID_IN AND LOCATION_ID = LOCATION_ID_IN AND ORGANIZATION_ID = ORGANIZATION_ID_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT /*+ PARALLEL(p 4) */ p.person_id , p.first_name , p.middle_names , p.last_name , p.previous_last_name , p.full_name , p.pre_name_adjunct , p.suffix , p.title , p.date_of_birth , p.country_of_birth , p.sex , p.email_address , NVL (svc.date_start, p.start_date) emp_hire_dt , p.original_date_of_hire orig_hire_dt , svc.adjusted_svc_date adj_service_dt , svc.accepted_termination_date accepted_termination_dt , svc.actual_termination_date actual_termination_dt , lrlkp.meaning leaving_reason , p.employee_number , p.applicant_number , p.npw_number , p.marital_status , p.national_identifier , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'CN' THEN p.per_information17 WHEN 'GB' THEN p.per_information1 WHEN 'IE' THEN p.per_information2 WHEN 'NZ' THEN p.per_information4 WHEN 'SG' THEN p.per_information18 WHEN 'ZA' THEN p.per_information5 ELSE NULL END ethnic_grp_code , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'US' THEN p.per_information4 WHEN 'SG' THEN p.per_information8 ELSE NULL END wrk_perm_type_code , p.correspondence_language , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'US' THEN p.per_information25 ELSE NULL END veteran_status_code , p.registered_disabled_flag , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'AE' THEN p.per_information10 WHEN 'KW' THEN p.per_information8 WHEN 'SA' THEN p.per_information7 WHEN 'ZG' THEN p.per_information16 WHEN 'ZA' THEN p.per_information7 ELSE NULL END w_religion_code , ( CASE WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) current_worker_flg , ( CASE WHEN sr.person_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) sales_rep_flg , ( CASE WHEN buy.agent_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) buyer_flg , ( CASE WHEN p.current_employee_flag IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) requestor_flg , ( CASE WHEN p.current_applicant_flag IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) applicant_flg , p.created_by , p.last_updated_by , p.creation_date , p.last_update_date , sr.aux1_changed_on_dt , buy.last_update_date aux2_changed_on_dt , p.effective_start_date , p.effective_end_date , l.meaning nationality , a.position_id position_id , a.business_group_id , a.location_id , a.organization_id , a.supervisor_id , a.manager_flag -- Newly Included , '0' AS x_custom , lc.meaning employee_category , lc.meaning transaction_code , p.attribute_category , p.attribute1 , p.attribute2 , p.attribute3 , p.attribute4 , p.attribute5 , p.attribute6 , p.attribute7 , p.attribute8 , (SELECT ppf9.full_name FROM per_all_people_f ppf9 WHERE ppf9.person_id = p.attribute9 AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf9.effective_start_date AND ppf9.effective_end_date ) attribute9 , p.attribute10 , NVL(pav.name, a.vacancy_id) AS attribute11 , p.attribute12 , p.attribute13 , p.attribute14 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'CL Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'IN Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute15 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'IN_RELIGION' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , 'PE Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute15 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'SG_RACE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No') , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute15 ) attribute15 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute16 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'IT Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute16 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'IT_PROVINCE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , 'PE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute16 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_PE_NI_TYPE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute16 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_SG_CITIZEN_STATUS' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No') , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute16 ) attribute16 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'ES Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute17 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_ES_CNAE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , p.attribute17 ) attribute17 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'BE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute18 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_BE_CORRESPONDENCE_LANGUAGE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute18 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'GB Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute18 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_GB_ACQUISITION_COMPANY' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , 'IE Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute18 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_IE_ACQUISITION_COMPANY' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang') ) , p.attribute18 ) attribute18 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'GB Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute19 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'IE Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute19 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute19 ) attribute19 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No') , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute20 ) attribute20 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'CZ Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute21 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'GB Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute21 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute21 ) attribute21 , p.attribute22 , p.attribute23 , p.attribute24 , p.attribute25 , p.attribute26 , p.attribute27 , p.attribute28 , p.attribute29 , p.attribute30 , p.KNOWN_AS , p.MAILSTOP , p.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE , p.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS , p.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG , p.TOWN_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed , p.REGION_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed , p.per_information2 , p.per_information7 , p.per_information8 , p.per_information9 , p.DATE_OF_DEATH , pa.secondary_approver , pt.Phone_number -- changed pp to pt by rar , ((sysdate- p.date_of_birth)/365) Age -- Age Rounded Issue --,(round((sysdate- p.date_of_birth)/365)) Age , pa.primary_approver , p.BENEFIT_GROUP_ID , p.USES_TOBACCO_FLAG , p.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG , p.RECEIPT_OF_DEATH_CERT_DATE , p.COORD_BEN_MED_PLN_NO , p.WORK_SCHEDULE , p.FTE_CAPACITY , p.DATE_EMPLOYEE_DATA_VERIFIED , p.STUDENT_STATUS , p.DPDNT_ADOPTION_DATE , pt.meaning PHONE_TYPE --Added newly - changed it top meaning from lookup_code , PPG.SEGMENT6 REG_TEMP_OTHER , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'NL' THEN p.per_information1 ELSE NULL END AS X_INITIALS , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'US' THEN p.per_information25 ELSE NULL END AS VETS100A_CODE,
CASE WHEN p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 0 THEN p.PER_INFORMATION29 ELSE p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG END as DISABILITY_CODE,
DECODE (p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID , 0, (SELECT distinct flv.meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values flv WHERE flv.lookup_code = p.PER_INFORMATION29 AND flv.lookup_type = 'US_OFCCP_DIASABILITY' AND flv.language = 'US') , (SELECT distinct flv.meaning FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values flv WHERE flv.lookup_code = p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG AND flv.lookup_type = 'REGISTERED_DISABLED' AND flv.language = 'US')) DISABILITY_NAME , upn.PEI_information4 ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_UPN, TALEO.PEI_INFORMATION3 X_TALEO_CAND_ID, EXT.EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM, EXT.EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME, EXT.EXT_SUP_TERM_DT, EXT.EXT_SUP_EMAIL, EXT.EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM
FROM --PER_PHONES PP commented by rar (SELECT ppf.person_id , MAX(DECODE(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT1',apr1.full_name,'')) Primary_Approver , MAX(DECODE(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT2',apr2.full_name,'')) Secondary_Approver FROM apps.per_people_x ppf , apps.per_people_x apr1 , apps.per_people_x apr2 , apps.per_person_analyses ppa , apps.per_analysis_criteria pac , apps.fnd_id_flex_segments fif , apps.fnd_id_flex_structures ffs WHERE 1 =1 AND ppf.person_id = ppa.person_id AND ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id AND pac.id_flex_num = fif.id_flex_num AND pac.id_flex_num = ffs.id_flex_num AND ffs.id_flex_structure_code = 'JEG Timesheet Approvers' AND pac.segment1 = apr1.person_id (+) AND pac.segment2 = apr2.person_id (+) --and ppf.person_id = 1536033 GROUP BY ppf.person_id )Pa , per_all_people_f p , per_person_type_usages_f pptu , per_person_types ppt , po_agents buy , per_periods_of_service svc , fnd_lookup_values lrlkp , per_all_vacancies pav , (SELECT res.source_id AS person_id , MAX (sr.last_update_date) aux1_changed_on_dt FROM ra_salesreps_all sr , jtf_rs_resource_extns res WHERE sr.resource_id = res.resource_id AND res.CATEGORY = 'EMPLOYEE' GROUP BY res.source_id ) sr , (SELECT a.person_id , a.employee_category , a.assignment_id , a.effective_start_date , a.effective_end_date , a.position_id , a.supervisor_id , a.business_group_id , a.organization_id , a.location_id , a.period_of_service_id , a.assignment_status_type_id , a.assignment_type , a.creation_date , a.last_update_date , a.manager_flag -- Newly Included , RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY assignment_id ORDER BY DECODE (a.assignment_type , 'E', 1 , 'C', 2 , 3 ) , a.primary_flag DESC , a.effective_start_date DESC , a.assignment_id DESC) cnt, a.people_group_id , a.vacancy_id FROM per_all_assignments_f a , per_assignment_status_types t WHERE a.assignment_type IN ('E', 'C', 'A') AND a.primary_flag = 'Y' AND a.assignment_status_type_id = t.assignment_status_type_id /* AND t.per_system_status NOT IN ('TERM_APL', 'TERM_ASSIGN', 'SUSP_ASSIGN', 'SUSP_CWK_ASG') */ ) a , (SELECT lookup_code , meaning FROM hr_standard_lookups WHERE lookup_type = 'NATIONALITY' ) l , (SELECT lookup_code , meaning FROM hr_standard_lookups WHERE lookup_type = 'EMPLOYEE_CATG' ) lc /* , (SELECT meaning,ppp.proposal_reason,paf.assignment_id,paf.person_id FROM HR_LOOKUPS hlpr , per_all_assignments_f paf , per_pay_proposals ppp WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE in('PROPOSAL_REASON') AND ppp.assignment_id = paf.assignment_id AND hlpr.lookup_code(+) = ppp.proposal_reason AND ppp.change_date BETWEEN paf.effective_start_date AND paf.effective_end_date) lcm */ -- modified by rar , (SELECT meaning, pp.parent_id, pp.phone_number FROM fnd_lookup_values, per_phones pp WHERE lookup_type(+) = 'PHONE_TYPE' AND lookup_code(+) = pp.phone_type AND language = userenv ('lang') AND enabled_flag = 'Y' ) pt --Added newly changed by RAR, (SELECT person_id, PEI_information4 FROM per_people_extra_info WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' ) upn, ( SELECT person_id,PEI_INFORMATION3 FROM per_people_extra_info WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' ) TALEO ,(SELECT papf.person_id , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION4 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION10 as EXT_SUP_TERM_DT , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION6 as EXT_SUP_EMAIL ,Case WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'CH' Then 'Legacy CH2M Oracle HR' WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'AT' Then 'ATEN PeopleSoft' WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'JE' Then 'Jacobs Oracle HR' Else Null END as EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM
FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F papf LEFT OUTER JOIN HR.PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO ppei ON papf.PERSON_ID = ppei.PERSON_ID AND ppei.INFORMATION_TYPE LIKE 'JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR%' WHERE 1=1 AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN papf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND papf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) EXT , PAY_PEOPLE_GROUPS PPG WHERE p.business_group_id NOT IN (SELECT /*+ USE_HASH( ffvs PPTU) */ hou.organization_id FROM apps.fnd_flex_value_sets ffvs , apps.fnd_flex_values ffv , apps.fnd_flex_values_tl ffvt, apps.HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS hou WHERE ffvs.flex_value_set_id = ffv.flex_value_set_id AND ffv.flex_value_id = ffvt.flex_value_id AND ffvt.language = 'US' AND ffvs.flex_value_set_name = 'JEG_HR_INTERFACE_BG_EXCLUSION_LIST' AND ffv.flex_value = hou.name ) AND pptu.person_id = p.person_id AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN pptu.effective_start_date AND pptu.effective_end_date AND ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id AND ppt.user_person_type NOT IN ('Foreign National' , 'Ex-Foreign National' ) AND p.person_id = buy.agent_id(+) AND p.person_id = svc.person_id(+) AND p.effective_start_date BETWEEN svc.date_start(+) AND CASE WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y') THEN NVL(svc.actual_termination_date(+), p.effective_start_date) ELSE NVL (1 + svc.actual_termination_date(+) , p.effective_start_date ) END AND lrlkp.lookup_type(+) = 'LEAV_REAS' AND lrlkp.LANGUAGE(+) = 'US' AND lrlkp.lookup_code(+) = svc.leaving_reason AND p.person_id = sr.person_id(+) AND p.person_id = a.person_id (+) AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN a.effective_start_date (+) AND a.effective_end_date (+) AND p.nationality = l.lookup_code(+) AND a.employee_category = lc.lookup_code(+) -- AND p.nationality = lcm.lookup_code(+) -- commented by RAR AND p.person_id = pt.parent_id(+) -- changed from ppto pt -- AND p.person_id=lcm.person_id(+) -- AND a.assignment_id=lcm.assignment_id AND p.person_id = pa.person_id(+) -- changed pp to pt and p.person_id = upn.person_id(+) and p.person_id = EXT.person_id(+) and p.person_id = TALEO.person_id(+) AND p.DATE_EMPLOYEE_DATA_VERIFIED IS NULL --and pp.phone_type = pt.lookup_code(+) -- Added Newly commented by rar AND a.people_group_id = ppg.people_group_id(+) AND pav.vacancy_id (+) = a.vacancy_id

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.ATTRIBUTE9 AS ATTRIBUTE9, PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F WHERE PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.ATTRIBUTE9 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.PERSON_ID, PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE--

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID AS LOCATION_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PRIMARY_FLAG AS PRIMARY_FLAG, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.APPLICATION_ID AS APPLICATION_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER AS ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE, DECODE(HL.style,'ES',APPS.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('HR_ES_LOCATION_TYPES',HL.address_line_1), 'PL',APPS.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('PL_STREET_TYPE', HL.address_line_1),HL.address_line_1) AS WORK_ST_ADDRESS, DECODE(HL.style,'AE_JEG',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('AE_CITY_CODES', HL.town_or_city) ,'CN_GLB',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('CN_PROVINCE', HL.town_or_city) ,'SA',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('SA_CITY', HL.town_or_city),HL.town_or_city) AS WORK_CITY,
HL.REGION_2 AS WORK_STATE_CODE, HL.REGION_1 AS WORK_STATE_REGION, HL.COUNTRY AS WORK_COUNTRY_CODE, HL.postal_code AS WORK_ZIPCODE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F@EPROD PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F , HR_LOCATIONS@EPROD HL WHERE PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID = HL.LOCATION_ID AND (SELECT MAX(LOAD_DT) FROM W_ETL_RUN_S) BETWEEN EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ORDER BY PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE DESC -- --AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PRIMARY_FLAG <>'N'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.MEANING as MEANING, FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LOOKUP_CODE as LOOKUP_CODE FROM FND_LOOKUP_VALUES WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE = 'US_VETERAN_STATUS_VETS100A' and LANGUAGE = 'US'

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Business component for Employee Dimension extracts information with respect to employee such as the employee name,address ,sex and so on from from Oracle Apps tables PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F, PER_PERIODS_OF_ SERVICE, RA_SALESREPS_ALL and PO_AGENTS_V .
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: mplt_BC_ORA_EmployeeDimension

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: This Mapping Extracts Employee information from Oracle Apps into the staging area table.The Employee Dimension table stores the attributes with respect to employee such as the employee name,address ,sex and so on also information whether the employee belongs to this organization as well as its ?extended organization??. The concept of the ?extended organization? would take care of contractors, third party organizations and other non-employees who help us to run our business.
MAPPING.NAME: SDE_ORA_EmployeeDimension

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Post SQL
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT p.person_id , p.first_name , p.middle_names , p.last_name , p.previous_last_name , p.full_name , p.pre_name_adjunct , p.suffix , p.title , p.date_of_birth , p.country_of_birth , p.sex , p.email_address , NVL (svc.date_start, p.start_date) emp_hire_dt , p.original_date_of_hire orig_hire_dt , svc.adjusted_svc_date adj_service_dt , svc.accepted_termination_date accepted_termination_dt , svc.actual_termination_date actual_termination_dt , lrlkp.meaning leaving_reason , p.employee_number , p.applicant_number , p.npw_number , p.marital_status , p.national_identifier , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'CN' THEN p.per_information17 WHEN 'GB' THEN p.per_information1 WHEN 'IE' THEN p.per_information2 WHEN 'NZ' THEN p.per_information4 WHEN 'SG' THEN p.per_information18 WHEN 'ZA' THEN p.per_information5 ELSE NULL END ethnic_grp_code , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'US' THEN p.per_information4 WHEN 'SG' THEN p.per_information8 ELSE NULL END wrk_perm_type_code , p.correspondence_language , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'US' THEN p.per_information25 ELSE NULL END veteran_status_code , p.registered_disabled_flag , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'AE' THEN p.per_information10 WHEN 'KW' THEN p.per_information8 WHEN 'SA' THEN p.per_information7 WHEN 'ZG' THEN p.per_information16 WHEN 'ZA' THEN p.per_information7 ELSE NULL END w_religion_code , (CASE WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) current_worker_flg , (CASE WHEN sr.person_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) sales_rep_flg , (CASE WHEN buy.agent_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) buyer_flg , (CASE WHEN p.current_employee_flag IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) requestor_flg , (CASE WHEN p.current_applicant_flag IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) applicant_flg , p.created_by , p.last_updated_by , p.creation_date , p.last_update_date , sr.aux1_changed_on_dt , buy.last_update_date aux2_changed_on_dt , p.effective_start_date , p.effective_end_date , l.meaning nationality , a.position_id position_id , a.business_group_id , a.location_id , a.organization_id , a.supervisor_id , a.manager_flag -- Newly Included , '0' AS x_custom , lc.meaning employee_category , lc.meaning transaction_code , p.attribute_category , p.attribute1 , p.attribute2 , p.attribute3 , p.attribute4 , p.attribute5 , p.attribute6 , p.attribute7 , p.attribute8 , (SELECT ppf9.full_name FROM per_all_people_f ppf9 WHERE ppf9.person_id = p.attribute9 AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf9.effective_start_date AND ppf9.effective_end_date) attribute9 , p.attribute10 , nvl(pav.name, a.vacancy_id) as attribute11 , p.attribute12 , p.attribute13 , p.attribute14 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'CL Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'IN Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute15 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'IN_RELIGION' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , 'PE Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute15 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute15 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'SG_RACE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No') , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute15 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute15 ) attribute15 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute16 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'IT Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute16 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'IT_PROVINCE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , 'PE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute16 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_PE_NI_TYPE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , 'SG Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute16 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_SG_CITIZEN_STATUS' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No') , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute16 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute16 ) attribute16 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'ES Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute17 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_ES_CNAE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , p.attribute17 ) attribute17 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'BE Additional Personal Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute18 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_BE_CORRESPONDENCE_LANGUAGE' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , 'FR Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute18 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'GB Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute18 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_GB_ACQUISITION_COMPANY' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , 'IE Additional Person Details', (SELECT meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.attribute18 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_IE_ACQUISITION_COMPANY' AND LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')) , p.attribute18 ) attribute18 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'GB Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute19 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'IE Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute19 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute19 ) attribute19 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'US Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No') , 'US Expatriate Employee', DECODE (p.attribute20 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute20 ) attribute20 , DECODE (p.attribute_category , 'CZ Additional Personal Details', DECODE (p.attribute21 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , 'GB Additional Person Details', DECODE (p.attribute21 , 'Y', 'Yes' , 'N', 'No' ) , p.attribute21 ) attribute21 , p.attribute22 , p.attribute23 , p.attribute24 , p.attribute25 , p.attribute26 , p.attribute27 , p.attribute28 , p.attribute29 , p.attribute30 ,p.KNOWN_AS ,p.MAILSTOP ,p.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE ,p.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS ,p.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG ,p.TOWN_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed ,p.REGION_OF_BIRTH --Column Order Changed ,p.per_information2 ,p.per_information7 ,p.per_information8 ,p.per_information9 ,p.DATE_OF_DEATH ,pa.secondary_approver ,pt.Phone_number -- changed pp to pt by rar ,((sysdate- p.date_of_birth)/365) Age -- Age Rounded Issue ,pa.primary_approver ,p.BENEFIT_GROUP_ID ,p.USES_TOBACCO_FLAG ,p.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG ,p.RECEIPT_OF_DEATH_CERT_DATE ,p.COORD_BEN_MED_PLN_NO ,p.WORK_SCHEDULE ,p.FTE_CAPACITY ,p.DATE_EMPLOYEE_DATA_VERIFIED ,p.STUDENT_STATUS ,p.DPDNT_ADOPTION_DATE ,pt.meaning PHONE_TYPE --Added newly - changed it top meaning from lookup_code ,PPG.SEGMENT6 REG_TEMP_OTHER ,CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'NL' THEN p.per_information1 ELSE NULL END AS X_INITIALS ,CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'US' THEN p.per_information25 ELSE NULL END AS VETS100A_CODE, CASE WHEN p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 0 THEN p.PER_INFORMATION29 ELSE p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG END as DISABILITY_CODE ,DECODE (p.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID , 0, (SELECT distinct meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.PER_INFORMATION29 AND lookup_type = 'US_OFCCP_DIASABILITY' AND language = 'US') , (SELECT distinct meaning FROM fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_code = p.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG AND lookup_type = 'REGISTERED_DISABLED' AND language = 'US')) DISABILITY_NAME ,upn.PEI_information4 ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_UPN ,TALEO.PEI_INFORMATION3 X_TALEO_CAND_ID ,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM ,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME ,'' AS EXT_SUP_TERM_DT ,'' AS EXT_SUP_EMAIL ,'' AS EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM ,a.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2 DEPARTMENT_CODE , CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'IN' THEN p.per_information4 END AS X_IN_PAN_NUM ,ppt.SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE ,p.OFFICE_NUMBER ,TS.Technologist_Solution_Area ,TS.TS_Currently_in_Program ,TS.TS_enabled_flag ,TS.TS_START_DATE ,TS.TS_END_DATE ,CASE p.per_information_category WHEN 'IN' THEN p.PER_INFORMATION16 ELSE NULL END AS x_aadhaar_num ,(select meaning from apps.fnd_lookup_values a where lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_DETAILED_LEAV_REAS' and LANGUAGE = 'US' and a.lookup_code = svc.pds_information16 ) as Detailed_leaving_reason ,svc.NOTIFIED_TERMINATION_DATE , p.party_id, (SELECT description FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values flv WHERE lookup_type = 'JEG_HR_ELT_SLT_FLAG' AND language = 'US' AND p.ATTRIBUTE11 = flv.lookup_code) ELT_SLT_FLAG --Added newly as part of SCTASK0886709 , EN.CONSULTATION_DATE ,EN.NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE ,EN.EYE_CARE ,TE.Tropical_Work_Eligibility ,TE.Tropical_Eligible_Country
FROM (select ppf.person_id ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT1',apr1.full_name,'')) Primary_Approver ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT2',apr2.full_name,'')) Secondary_Approver from apps.per_people_x ppf ,apps.per_people_x apr1 ,apps.per_people_x apr2 ,apps.per_person_analyses ppa ,apps.per_analysis_criteria pac ,apps.fnd_id_flex_segments fif ,apps.fnd_id_flex_structures ffs where 1=1 and ppf.person_id = ppa.person_id and ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id and pac.id_flex_num = fif.id_flex_num and pac.id_flex_num = ffs.id_flex_num and ffs.id_flex_structure_code = 'JEG Timesheet Approvers' and pac.segment1 = apr1.person_id (+) and pac.segment2 = apr2.person_id (+) group by ppf.person_id)Pa ,(select ppa.person_id , pac.segment4 as Technologist_Solution_Area , pac.segment3 as TS_Currently_in_Program , pac.enabled_flag as TS_enabled_flag , ppa.date_from as TS_START_DATE , ppa.date_to as TS_END_DATE ,ppa.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PPA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,pac.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PAC_LAST_UPDATE_DATE from PER_PERSON_ANALYSES ppa , PER_ANALYSIS_CRITERIA pac , apps.fnd_id_flex_structures_tl fifs where 1=1 and ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id and ppa.ID_FLEX_NUM = fifs.ID_FLEX_NUM and fifs.id_flex_structure_name = 'Technologist Solutions' and fifs.language = 'US' and trunc(sysdate) between nvl(ppa.date_from, trunc(sysdate)) and nvl(ppa.date_to, trunc(sysdate)))TS ,per_all_people_f p , per_person_type_usages_f pptu , per_person_types ppt , po_agents buy , per_periods_of_service svc , fnd_lookup_values lrlkp , per_all_vacancies pav , (SELECT res.source_id AS person_id , MAX (sr.last_update_date) aux1_changed_on_dt FROM ra_salesreps_all sr , jtf_rs_resource_extns res WHERE sr.resource_id = res.resource_id AND res.CATEGORY = 'EMPLOYEE' GROUP BY res.source_id) sr , (SELECT a.person_id , a.employee_category , a.assignment_id , a.effective_start_date , a.effective_end_date , a.position_id , a.supervisor_id , a.business_group_id , a.organization_id , a.location_id , a.period_of_service_id , a.assignment_status_type_id , a.assignment_type , a.creation_date , a.last_update_date , a.manager_flag -- Newly Included , RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY assignment_id ORDER BY DECODE (a.assignment_type , 'E', 1 , 'C', 2 , 3 ) , a.primary_flag DESC , a.effective_start_date DESC , a.assignment_id DESC) cnt , a.people_group_id , a.vacancy_id , a.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2 FROM per_all_assignments_f a , per_assignment_status_types t WHERE a.assignment_type IN ('E', 'C', 'A') AND a.primary_flag = 'Y' AND a.assignment_status_type_id = t.assignment_status_type_id ) a , (SELECT lookup_code , meaning FROM hr_standard_lookups WHERE lookup_type = 'NATIONALITY') l , (SELECT lookup_code , meaning FROM hr_standard_lookups WHERE lookup_type = 'EMPLOYEE_CATG') lc
, (SELECT meaning,pp.parent_id,pp.phone_number FROM fnd_lookup_values,per_phones pp WHERE lookup_type(+) = 'PHONE_TYPE' AND lookup_code(+) = pp.phone_type AND language = userenv ('lang') AND enabled_flag = 'Y' ) pt --Added newly changed by RAR , (select person_id, MAX(date_from) aux3_changed_on_dt, MAX(last_update_date) last_update_date from per_addresses WHERE person_id is not null group by person_id) py , (select person_id, MAX(last_update_date) aux4_changed_on_dt from PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO WHERE person_id is not null AND INFORMATION_TYPE IN ('JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW','JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID','US_ETHNIC_ORIGIN','JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR' ) group by person_id) ppei, (SELECT ppei.person_id, PEI_information4 FROM per_people_extra_info ppei , (select person_id, max(object_version_number) object_version_number FROM per_people_extra_info WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' and pei_information4 is not null group by person_id) upnmax WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' and pei_information4 is not null and ppei.person_id=upnmax.person_id and ppei.object_version_number=upnmax.object_version_number) upn, ( SELECT person_id,PEI_INFORMATION3 FROM per_people_extra_info WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' ) TALEO ,(SELECT papf.person_id , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION4 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION10 as EXT_SUP_TERM_DT , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION6 as EXT_SUP_EMAIL ,Case WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'CH' Then 'Legacy CH2M Oracle HR' WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'AT' Then 'ATEN PeopleSoft' WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'JE' Then 'Jacobs Oracle HR' Else Null END as EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F papf LEFT OUTER JOIN HR.PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO ppei ON papf.PERSON_ID = ppei.PERSON_ID AND ppei.INFORMATION_TYPE LIKE 'JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR%' WHERE 1=1 AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN papf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND papf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) EXT ,PAY_PEOPLE_GROUPS PPG ,(SELECT pma.person_id AS person_id, ppf.full_name AS full_name, pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE AS CONSULTATION_TYPE , hl1.meaning AS CONSULTATION_TYPE_DESC, pma.CONSULTATION_DATE AS CONSULTATION_DATE, pma.attribute1 AS EYE_CARE, pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT AS CONSULTATION_RESULT, hl2.meaning AS CONSULTATION_RESULT_DESC, pma.NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE AS NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE, pma.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM per_medical_assessments pma, per_all_people_f ppf, FND_COMMON_lookups hl1, FND_COMMON_lookups hl2 WHERE pma.person_id = ppf.person_id AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf.effective_start_date AND ppf.effective_end_date AND pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE ='PLPMA' AND pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE = hl1.lookup_code(+) AND hl1.lookup_type(+) = 'CONSULTATION_TYPE' AND pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT = hl2.lookup_code(+) AND hl2.lookup_type(+) = 'CONSULTATION_RESULT' and pma.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY='PL Assessment Details' ) EN ,( select next_consultation_date , PERSON_ID, pma.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE , attribute4 as Tropical_Work_Eligibility -- new data item , (SELECT meaning FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values where lookup_type = 'JEG_PL_TROPICAL_ELIG_COUNTRY' and language = 'US' and lookup_code = pma.attribute5) as Tropical_Eligible_Country -- new data item from PER_MEDICAL_ASSESSMENTS pma where attribute_category = 'PL Assessment Details' and attribute5 is not null and attribute4 is not null ) TE
WHERE ( p.creation_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR p.last_update_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR svc.last_update_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR sr.aux1_changed_on_dt >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR buy.creation_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR buy.last_update_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR a.creation_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR a.last_update_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR py.aux3_changed_on_dt >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR py.last_update_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR ppei.aux4_changed_on_dt >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR pptu.last_update_date >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR TS.TS_PPA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR TS.TS_PAC_LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR EN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss') OR TE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= TO_DATE ('$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:mi:ss')
) and p.business_group_id NOT IN (SELECT /*+ USE_HASH( ffvs PPTU) */ hou.organization_id FROM apps.fnd_flex_value_sets ffvs , apps.fnd_flex_values ffv , apps.fnd_flex_values_tl ffvt, apps.HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS hou WHERE ffvs.flex_value_set_id = ffv.flex_value_set_id AND ffv.flex_value_id = ffvt.flex_value_id AND ffvt.language = 'US' AND ffvs.flex_value_set_name = 'JEG_HR_INTERFACE_BG_EXCLUSION_LIST' AND ffv.flex_value = hou.name) AND pptu.person_id = p.person_id AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN pptu.effective_start_date AND pptu.effective_end_date AND ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id AND ppt.user_person_type NOT IN ('Foreign National' , 'Ex-Foreign National' ) AND ppt.system_person_type IN ('EMP','EMP_APL','EX_EMP','EX_EMP_APL') AND ((ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Employee%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Expatriate%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Job Shopper%') OR (ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-employee%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-Expatriate%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Ex-Job Shopper%')) AND p.person_id = buy.agent_id(+) AND p.person_id = svc.person_id(+) AND p.effective_start_date BETWEEN svc.date_start(+) AND CASE WHEN (p.current_employee_flag = 'Y' OR p.current_npw_flag = 'Y') THEN NVL(svc.actual_termination_date(+), p.effective_start_date)ELSE NVL (1 + svc.actual_termination_date(+) , p.effective_start_date ) END AND lrlkp.lookup_type(+) = 'LEAV_REAS' AND lrlkp.LANGUAGE(+) = 'US' AND lrlkp.lookup_code(+) = svc.leaving_reason AND p.person_id = sr.person_id(+) AND p.person_id = a.person_id (+) AND p.effective_end_date BETWEEN a.effective_start_date (+) AND a.effective_end_date (+) AND p.nationality = l.lookup_code(+) AND a.employee_category = lc.lookup_code(+) AND p.person_id = pt.parent_id(+) -- changed from ppto pt and p.person_id = pa.person_id(+) -- changed pp to pt AND p.person_id = TS.person_id(+) and p.person_id = py.person_id(+) and p.person_id = ppei.person_id(+) and p.person_id = upn.person_id(+) and p.person_id = EXT.person_id(+) and p.person_id = TALEO.person_id(+) AND a.people_group_id = ppg.people_group_id(+) AND P.person_id = EN.person_id(+) AND P.person_id = TE.person_id(+) and pav.vacancy_id (+) = a.vacancy_id

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID AS LOCATION_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PRIMARY_FLAG AS PRIMARY_FLAG, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.APPLICATION_ID AS APPLICATION_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER AS ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE, DECODE(HL.style,'ES',APPS.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('HR_ES_LOCATION_TYPES',HL.address_line_1), 'PL',APPS.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('PL_STREET_TYPE', HL.address_line_1),HL.address_line_1) AS WORK_ST_ADDRESS, DECODE(HL.style,'AE_JEG',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('AE_CITY_CODES', HL.town_or_city) ,'CN_GLB',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('CN_PROVINCE', HL.town_or_city) ,'SA',apps.hr_general.decode_lookup@EPROD('SA_CITY', HL.town_or_city),HL.town_or_city) AS WORK_CITY,
HL.REGION_2 AS WORK_STATE_CODE, HL.REGION_1 AS WORK_STATE_REGION, HL.COUNTRY AS WORK_COUNTRY_CODE, HL.postal_code AS WORK_ZIPCODE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F@EPROD PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F , HR_LOCATIONS@EPROD HL WHERE PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID = HL.LOCATION_ID AND (SELECT MAX(LOAD_DT) FROM W_ETL_RUN_S) BETWEEN EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ORDER BY PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE DESC -- --AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PRIMARY_FLAG <>'N'

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_ORA_EmployeeDimension.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_ORA_EmployeeDimension.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_ORA_EmployeeDimension.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
